title: lomaria socialis
intro: Lomaria socialis, also known as the Australian maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. Traditionally, the Lomaria socialis plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lomaria socialis are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Lomaria socialis is often used as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture form to extract its medicinal properties.
